text: ⚡️ 🇮🇩 🇫🇷 AFP: Indonesia and France agreed to boost defence industry cooperation during a meeting between President Prabowo Subianto and President Emmanuel Macron in Paris. Indonesia said the talks covered procurement of defence equipment, strengthening the defence industry, and cooperation in energy transition and renewable energy development. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇩 🇫🇷 法新社：印度尼西亚和法国在普拉博沃·苏比安托总统与埃马纽埃尔·马克龙总统在巴黎会晤期间，同意加强国防工业合作。印尼表示，会谈涵盖了国防装备采购、加强国防工业，以及在能源转型和可再生能源开发方面的合作。 @wfwitness

text: WATCH: Polish MP Konrad Berkowicz displayed a modified Israeli flag with the Star of David replaced by a swastika in parliament, saying, “Israel is the new Third Reich.”
text_zh: 观看：波兰议员康拉德·伯科维奇（Konrad Berkowicz）在议会展示了一面修改过的以色列国旗，将大卫之星换成了纳粹万字旗，并称：“以色列是新的第三帝国。”

text: 🇹🇷 🇮🇷 ⚡️ A convoy of Turkish citizens -- over 500 vehicles -- has departed from the city of Iğdır toward the Bazargan border to express support and solidarity with the people of Iran
text_zh: 🇹🇷 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 一支由土耳其公民组成的车队——超过500辆汽车——已从厄德尔市出发前往巴扎甘边境，以表达对伊朗人民的支持和声援。

text: King Charles III will visit the United States from April 27–30, where he’ll address Congress and meet privately with Trump. Source: CNN
text_zh: 查尔斯三世国王将于4月27日至30日访问美国，届时他将在国会发表演讲并与特朗普进行私人会晤。来源：CNN

text: BIG: Europe is quietly preparing a backup plan for NATO in case Trump pulls the U.S. out or reduces its support. The idea is to make the alliance far more European-led—sometimes called a “European NATO”—so the continent can still defend itself. Source: WSJ
text_zh: 重大消息：欧洲正在悄悄为北约制定备份计划，以防特朗普让美国退出或减少支持。其构想是让该联盟更多地由欧洲主导——有时被称为“欧洲北约”——以便欧洲大陆仍能自卫。来源：华尔街日报

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 🇳🇴 🇺🇦 GOOD NEWS | Norway’s Prime Minister said that the six F-16 Fighting Falcon jets pledged to Ukraine are already under Ukrainian ownership, with Belgian technicians currently working on their repair and preparation for operations. “I believe the first of these aircraft will be ready for combat use soon,” said Jonas Gahr Støre. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231 ：❗️ 🇳🇴 🇺🇦 好消息 | 挪威首相表示，承诺提供给乌克兰的六架F-16“战隼”战斗机已归乌克兰所有，比利时技术人员目前正在对其进行维修和作战准备。乔纳斯·加尔·斯特勒（Jonas Gahr Støre）说：“我相信这些飞机中的第一架很快就能投入战斗。” 关注我们的最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ According to DeepState, Russia continues efforts to establish a buffer zone along the Sumy region border, with the newly formed enemy-controlled and infiltration area (red and gray zones) now covering around 150 km². ▪️ At the same time, Ukrainian forces are attempting to eliminate this zone. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231 ：❗️ 据DeepState称，俄罗斯继续努力沿苏梅地区边境建立缓冲区，新形成的敌方控制和渗透区（红区和灰区）目前覆盖约150平方公里。▪️ 与此同时，乌克兰军队正试图消除该区域。关注我们的最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in Kiryat Shmona, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部谢莫纳城（Kiryat Shmona）及对抗线周边地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇨🇳 🇷🇺 Chinese President Xi Jinping met with Russian Foreign Minister Sergei Lavrov in Beijing. China’s MFA says Xi called for deeper strategic communication and diplomatic coordination amid global instability. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇨🇳 🇷🇺 中国国家主席习近平在北京会见了俄罗斯外交部长谢尔盖·拉夫罗夫。中国外交部表示，习近平呼吁在当前全球不稳定的背景下，深化战略沟通与外交协调。 @wfwitness

text: NEW: Satellite images show Iran using heavy equipment to dig out missile launchers trapped in underground tunnels during the ceasefire. Recent US intelligence estimates that roughly half of Iran’s missile launchers remain intact after a month of fighting. Many were likely buried by US and Israeli strikes on tunnel entrances, and Iran now appears to be recovering them. Source: CNN
text_zh: 最新消息：卫星图像显示，伊朗在停火期间使用重型设备挖掘被困在地下隧道中的导弹发射器。美国情报部门近期估计，经过一个月的战斗，伊朗约有一半的导弹发射器仍保持完好。许多发射器很可能是被美国和以色列对隧道入口的打击所掩埋，而伊朗目前似乎正在回收它们。来源：CNN

text: 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇫🇷 Israeli Ambassador to the US on Lebanon talks: We certainly don’t want the French anywhere near these negotiations. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇫🇷 以色列驻美大使就黎巴嫩会谈表示：我们当然不希望法国人参与这些谈判。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 💬 🇮🇷 U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent: We are partnering with our Gulf allies. They are much more willing to share the bank accounts of members of the Iranian regime. We are reaching out to banks, including Chinese banks. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 💬 🇮🇷 美国财政部长斯科特·贝森特（Scott Bessent）：我们正在与海湾盟友合作。他们更愿意分享伊朗政权成员的银行账户信息。我们正在接触包括中国银行在内的各家银行。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇩🇪 🇸🇩 Germany will provide an additional €20 million in aid to Sudan this year, with further funding still under review. Germany provided €155.4 million by the end of 2025 for Sudan and neighbouring countries affected by the war. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇩🇪 🇸🇩 德国今年将向苏丹额外提供2000万欧元援助，更多资金仍在评估中。截至2025年底，德国已向苏丹及受战争影响的邻国提供了1.554亿欧元援助。 @wfwitness

text: Israeli Ambassador to the U.S. Yechiel Leiter on Lebanon talks: We certainly don’t want the French anywhere near these negotiations. We’d like to keep the French as far away as possible from pretty much everything. They’re not needed. They’re not a positive influence.
text_zh: 以色列驻美大使耶希尔·莱特（Yechiel Leiter）就黎巴嫩会谈表示：我们当然不希望法国人参与这些谈判。我们希望让法国人尽可能远离几乎所有事情。他们是不必要的，也不是积极的影响力。

text: 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Reuters: "Despite Israeli 'firepower', Netanyahu struggles for political gains in 'Iran war'" Danny Citrinowicz, a senior Iran researcher at Zionist Institute for National Security Studies (INSS) and former head of the Iran desk in Zionist military intelligence: "Netanyahu is not winning. This war is a strategic failure. There is a gap between what he promised at the start of the campaign and where we ended up."
text_zh: 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 路透社：“尽管以色列拥有‘火力’，但内塔尼亚胡在‘伊朗战争’中难以获得政治收益”。犹太复国主义国家安全研究所（INSS）高级伊朗研究员、前犹太复国主义军事情报局伊朗处处长丹尼·西特里诺维奇（Danny Citrinowicz）表示：“内塔尼亚胡并没有赢。这场战争是一次战略失败。他在竞选开始时所承诺的与我们最终的结果之间存在差距。”

text: Stephen Miller: President Trump has put Iran in a box. He has played the checkmate move. No matter what path Iran chooses, America wins.
text_zh: 斯蒂芬·米勒（Stephen Miller）：特朗普总统已经把伊朗逼入了绝境。他已经走出了将死的一步。无论伊朗选择哪条路，美国都会赢。

text: Stephen Miller: What you are watching now in Iran with the implementation of this blockade is the total resetting of the American power dynamic. For the next 100 years.
text_zh: 斯蒂芬·米勒：你现在在伊朗看到的这种封锁的实施，是美国权力动态的全面重置。未来100年都是如此。

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding near Nahariya, Acre, and other surrounding areas in Northern Israel: • Confrontation Line • Upper Galilee @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部纳哈里亚（Nahariya）、阿卡（Acre）及其他周边地区响起红色警报：• 对抗线 • 上加利利 @wfwitness

text: U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent: We are partnering with our Gulf allies. They are much more willing to share the bank accounts of members of the Iranian regime. We are reaching out to banks, including Chinese banks. Any Iranian goods purchases are forbidden. We will press for secondary sanctions if there’s a problem.
text_zh: 美国财政部长斯科特·贝森特：我们正在与海湾盟友合作。他们更愿意分享伊朗政权成员的银行账户信息。我们正在接触包括中国银行在内的各家银行。任何伊朗商品的购买都是被禁止的。如果出现问题，我们将推动二级制裁。

text: OSINTtechnical Iran used a Chinese satellite to gather intelligence it used to target numerous sites across the Middle East -FT TEE-01B, a visual imaging satellite launched in 2024, saw use gathering imagery of Prince Sultan Air Base just hours before and after a missile attack on 3/14. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2044283073806606480/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical：伊朗利用一颗中国卫星收集情报，用于瞄准中东各地的多个地点——FT。TEE-01B是一颗2024年发射的视觉成像卫星，在3月14日导弹袭击前后的几个小时内，被用于收集苏丹亲王空军基地的图像。 https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2044283073806606480/photo/1 推文

text: U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent on climate change: The natural habitat for the earth is actually water. The climate does change. We are going through cycles.
text_zh: 美国财政部长斯科特·贝森特谈气候变化：地球的自然栖息地实际上是水。气候确实在变化。我们正在经历周期。

text: JD Vance on Epstein: What you see in those emails is that Jeffrey Epstein hated Donald Trump, and Donald Trump hated Jeffrey Epstein.
text_zh: JD·万斯（JD Vance）谈爱泼斯坦：你在那些电子邮件中看到的是，杰弗里·爱泼斯坦讨厌唐纳德·特朗普，而唐纳德·特朗普讨厌杰弗里·爱泼斯坦。

text: 🇺🇸 💬 JD Vance on Epstein: If you look at the emails, it’s obvious that Jeffrey Epstein hated Donald J. Trump. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 💬 JD·万斯谈爱泼斯坦：如果你看那些邮件，很明显杰弗里·爱泼斯坦讨厌唐纳德·J·特朗普。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 💬 JD Vance explains what Trump means when he says the Epstein thing is a hoax 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 💬 JD·万斯解释特朗普所说的“爱泼斯坦事件是一场骗局”是什么意思 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇨🇳 FT: Iran’s IRGC Aerospace Force secretly acquired a Chinese-built spy satellite, the TEE-01B, in late 2024, reportedly gaining new surveillance capability over U.S. military sites in the Middle East. The satellite was used to monitor bases including Prince Sultan Air Base in Saudi Arabia, Muwaffaq Salti Air Base in Jordan, and areas near U.S. facilities in Bahrain and Iraq during recent regional tensions. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇨🇳 金融时报：伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队航空航天部队在2024年底秘密获得了一颗中国制造的间谍卫星TEE-01B，据报道获得了对中东美军基地的新监视能力。在近期的地区紧张局势中，该卫星被用于监视包括沙特阿拉伯的苏丹亲王空军基地、约旦的穆瓦法克·萨尔蒂空军基地，以及巴林和伊拉克美军设施附近的区域。 @wfwitness

text: JD Vance on Epstein: If you look at the emails, it’s obvious that Jeffrey Epstein hated Donald J. Trump. The fact that Jeffrey Epstein hates Donald J. Trump is a pretty good thing for Donald J. Trump.
text_zh: JD·万斯谈爱泼斯坦：如果你看那些邮件，很明显杰弗里·爱泼斯坦讨厌唐纳德·J·特朗普。杰弗里·爱泼斯坦讨厌唐纳德·J·特朗普这一事实对唐纳德·J·特朗普来说是件好事。

text: U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent: A Chinese EV is a coal-powered vehicle.
text_zh: 美国财政部长斯科特·贝森特：中国电动汽车是燃煤驱动的车辆。

text: JD Vance on Epstein: When Trump says this is a hoax, he’s not saying it’s a hoax that Epstein was a scumbag or connected to powerful people—he’s saying the Democratic idea that he was Epstein’s best friend is a hoax.
text_zh: JD·万斯谈爱泼斯坦：当特朗普说这是一场骗局时，他并不是说爱泼斯坦是个混蛋或与权贵有联系是骗局——他是在说民主党人认为他是爱泼斯坦最好的朋友这一说法是骗局。

text: 🇺🇸 💬 🇺🇦 JD Vance: Stopping funding the Ukraine war is one of the things I’m proudest of we’ve done in this administration. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 💬 🇺🇦 JD·万斯：停止资助乌克兰战争是我在本届政府中所做的最引以为豪的事情之一。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: JD Vance: Stopping funding the Ukraine war is one of the things I’m proudest of we’ve done in this administration.
text_zh: JD·万斯：停止资助乌克兰战争是我在本届政府中所做的最引以为豪的事情之一。

text: 🇺🇸 In case you ever wonder what is Biden up to - he's being his usual self. For example, he was really excited to find a guy who looks like Obama 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 如果你想知道拜登在做什么——他还是老样子。例如，他非常兴奋地找到了一个长得像奥巴马的人 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Russia's Lavrov says Russia can “without a doubt, compensate” China’s resource shortfall from the Iran war.
text_zh: 俄罗斯拉夫罗夫表示，俄罗斯可以“毫无疑问地弥补”中国因伊朗战争而产生的资源缺口。

text: Maria Bartiromo: Is the Iran war over? Trump: I think it’s close to over. Yeah. I mean I view it as very close to over.
text_zh: 玛丽亚·巴蒂罗莫（Maria Bartiromo）：伊朗战争结束了吗？特朗普：我认为快结束了。是的。我的意思是，我认为它非常接近结束。

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 Russian Security Council: “The US and Israel may use negotiations to prepare a ground operation in Iran, as the Pentagon continues to build up troop deployments in the region”
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 俄罗斯安全委员会：“美国和以色列可能会利用谈判来准备对伊朗的地面行动，因为五角大楼继续在该地区增加部队部署”

text: Trump to ABC News: If I weren’t president, the world would be torn to pieces.
text_zh: 特朗普对美国广播公司新闻（ABC News）表示：如果我不是总统，世界就会分崩离析。

text: Trump says he doesn’t plan to extend the ceasefire with Iran, calling it unnecessary, and hinted at “an amazing two days ahead.” Source: ABC News
text_zh: 特朗普表示他不打算延长与伊朗的停火协议，称其没有必要，并暗示“未来两天将会有惊人的事情发生”。来源：ABC News

text: 🇷🇺 💬 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 The US and Israel may use negotiations to prepare a ground operation in Iran, as the Pentagon continues to build up troop deployments in the region — Russian Security Council 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 💬 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国和以色列可能会利用谈判来准备对伊朗的地面行动，因为五角大楼继续在该地区增加部队部署 —— 俄罗斯安全委员会 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump, randomly: NATO wasn’t there for us, and they won’t be there for us in the future!
text_zh: 特朗普，随口说道：北约过去没有支持我们，未来也不会支持我们！

text: Trump: Will someone please tell Pope Leo that Iran has killed at least 42,000 innocent, completely unarmed, protesters in the last two months, and that for Iran to have a Nuclear Bomb is absolutely unacceptable. Thank you for your attention to this matter.
text_zh: 特朗普：有人能告诉教皇利奥，伊朗在过去两个月里杀害了至少42,000名无辜、手无寸铁的抗议者，而且伊朗拥有核弹是绝对不可接受的吗？感谢您对此事的关注。

text: 🇺🇸 💬 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent says China will be cut off from Iranian oil: Those ships aren’t going to be allowed out anymore… they’re not going to be able to get their oil. They can get oil. Not Iranian oil. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 💬 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 美国财政部长斯科特·贝森特表示中国将被切断伊朗石油供应：那些船只将不再被允许离开……他们将无法获得石油。他们可以获得石油，但不是伊朗石油。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in Kiryat Shmona, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部谢莫纳城（Kiryat Shmona）及对抗线周边地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: Will someone please tell Donnie to stop treating Truth Social like it’s the Oval Office? And there is no credible evidence that Iranian authorities “killed at least 42,000 innocent, completely unarmed, protestors” in the riots and protests two months ago.
text_zh: 有人能告诉唐尼别再把“真实社交”（Truth Social）当成椭圆形办公室了吗？而且没有可靠证据表明伊朗当局在两个月前的骚乱和抗议中“杀害了至少42,000名无辜、手无寸铁的抗议者”。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇵🇪 AP: Peru’s election is facing major voting disruptions after authorities failed to deliver ballots and election materials to multiple polling stations on time, delaying the opening of voting centers across the country and abroad. The issues left thousands…" ⚡️ 🇵🇪 Right-wing candidate Rafael López Aliaga alleged fraud in Peru’s presidential election and gave the head of Peru’s electoral court a 24-hour ultimatum to annul the results, warning he would call for a “civil insurgency” if not complied with, saying “we give you 24 hours to declare this garbage null.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇵🇪 美联社：秘鲁选举面临重大投票中断，当局未能按时将选票和选举材料送达多个投票站，导致全国及海外投票中心推迟开放。这些问题导致数千人……” ⚡️ 🇵🇪 右翼候选人拉斐尔·洛佩斯·阿里亚加（Rafael López Aliaga）指控秘鲁总统选举存在舞弊，并向秘鲁选举法院院长发出24小时最后通牒，要求宣布结果无效，警告如果不遵守，他将呼吁进行“公民暴动”，称“我们给你24小时宣布这堆垃圾无效”。 @wfwitness

text: 🇷🇺 🇨🇳 ⚡️ Lavrov: Russia & China Reject Western Hegemony Rooted in Colonialism "Blatant attempts by the West, both the United States and Europe, to maintain and even upgrade its hegemony… including the slave trade, colonialism… continue living… at the expense of others" He warned West Asia and the Persian Gulf is “a crisis knot” that cannot be easily cut. — @SputnikInt
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇨🇳 ⚡️ 拉夫罗夫：俄罗斯和中国拒绝根植于殖民主义的西方霸权。“西方，包括美国和欧洲，公然试图维持甚至升级其霸权……包括奴隶贸易、殖民主义……继续生活在……牺牲他人利益的基础上。” 他警告说，西亚和波斯湾是“一个危机结”，不容易解开。 — @SputnikInt

text: OSINTdefender Iran secretly used a ‌Chinese spy satellite during the recent war that gave its military new capability to target U.S. military bases across the ‌Middle ⁠East, sources tell the ⁠Financial Times. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2044271133571092959/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：消息人士告诉《金融时报》，伊朗在最近的战争中秘密使用了一颗中国间谍卫星，使其军队获得了瞄准中东各地美军基地的新能力。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2044271133571092959/photo/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index Trump says that NATO 'was not there for us' and won't be in the future. https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2044266327523897826/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index：特朗普表示，北约“过去没有支持我们”，未来也不会支持我们。 https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2044266327523897826/photo/1 推文

text: 🇷🇺 🇨🇳 ⚡️ “The international situation… is now being aggravated by the actions of our Western colleagues in regions including Ukraine, Latin America and the Strait of Hormuz " — Lavrov — @SputnikInt
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇨🇳 ⚡️ “国际局势……目前正因我们西方同事在包括乌克兰、拉丁美洲和霍尔木兹海峡在内的地区的行动而加剧。” — 拉夫罗夫 — @SputnikInt

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇨🇳 Reuters: A Chinese tanker sanctioned by the United States has passed through the Strait of Hormuz despite the U.S. blockade, according to shipping data. The vessel, identified as Rich Starry, is reported to have carried around 250,000 barrels of methanol…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇨🇳 Reuters: The U.S.-sanctioned Chinese tanker Rich Starry returned to the Strait of Hormuz on Wednesday after briefly exiting the Gulf, failing to break the U.S. blockade. It had been one of at least eight ships crossing the waterway on the first day of the blockade. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇨🇳 路透社：据航运数据显示，一艘被美国制裁的中国油轮尽管受到美国封锁，仍通过了霍尔木兹海峡。该船被确认为Rich Starry号，据报道载有约25万桶甲醇……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇨🇳 路透社：被美国制裁的中国油轮Rich Starry号在短暂离开海湾后，于周三返回霍尔木兹海峡，未能打破美国的封锁。它是封锁第一天穿过该水道的至少八艘船只之一。 @wfwitness

text: 🇷🇺 💬 Russia can make up for the energy resource deficit of China and other interested countries, which arose against the backdrop of the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, Lavrov said during his visit to China. Other statements by the head of the Russian Foreign Ministry: ➡️ Putin's visit to China will take place in the first half of 2026. ➡️ Lavrov reported that he discussed the aggravation of the situation in the world due to the actions of the West, the situation in the Middle East, the militarization of the EU, and the crisis in NATO. ➡️ The US and Iran should promote realistic goals in the negotiations, and Russia and China are ready to promote any formats of their external support. ➡️ Moscow will accept any decision by Iran on enriched uranium and is ready to play a role in resolving this issue. ➡️ Relations between Russia and the US are not at a "freezing point", contacts are being conducted, but not all of them are being reported on. ➡️ At the negotiations on Ukraine in Alaska, the discussion focused on recognizing the de jure realities on the ground, and Moscow remains committed to the agreements reached at the summit. ➡️ US sanctions against Russia remain in place, as does the discrimination of Russian energy companies in the market. ➡️ The West is plotting a new military bloc, in which Ukraine is a leading participant. ➡️ Macron is reveling in the idea of creating "stabilization forces" in Ukraine. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 💬 拉夫罗夫在访华期间表示，俄罗斯可以弥补在霍尔木兹海峡封锁背景下，中国和其他相关国家出现的能源资源短缺。俄罗斯外交部长的其他声明：➡️ 普京将于2026年上半年访华。➡️ 拉夫罗夫报告称，他讨论了因西方行动导致的世界局势恶化、中东局势、欧盟军事化以及北约危机。➡️ 美国和伊朗应在谈判中推动现实目标，俄罗斯和中国准备推动任何形式的外部支持。➡️ 莫斯科将接受伊朗关于浓缩铀的任何决定，并准备在解决这一问题上发挥作用。➡️ 俄美关系并未处于“冰点”，双方保持着联系，但并非所有联系都已公开。➡️ 在阿拉斯加举行的乌克兰问题谈判中，讨论重点是承认实地法律现实，莫斯科仍致力于峰会上达成的协议。➡️ 美国对俄制裁依然存在，对俄罗斯能源公司在市场上的歧视也依然存在。➡️ 西方正在策划一个新的军事集团，乌克兰是其中的主要参与者。➡️ 马克龙沉迷于在乌克兰建立“稳定部队”的想法。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇵🇪 Peru voted in its 2026 general election following a turbulent period that saw seven presidents in nine years. A total of 34 candidates are competing in a crowded first round where the top two advance to a June runoff. The main contenders include: Right…" ⚡️ 🇵🇪 AP: Peru’s election is facing major voting disruptions after authorities failed to deliver ballots and election materials to multiple polling stations on time, delaying the opening of voting centers across the country and abroad. The issues left thousands of voters unable to cast ballots as scheduled, forcing officials to extend voting into an additional day in affected areas. Election observers said the problems were logistical in nature, with an EU mission stating there was no sufficient evidence to support claims of fraud, despite criticism from some candidates, namely López Aliaga. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇵🇪 秘鲁在经历了九年内更换七位总统的动荡时期后，举行了2026年大选。共有34名候选人参加了拥挤的第一轮角逐，前两名将进入6月的决选。主要竞争者包括：右翼……” ⚡️ 🇵🇪 美联社：秘鲁选举面临重大投票中断，当局未能按时将选票和选举材料送达多个投票站，导致全国及海外投票中心推迟开放。这些问题导致数千名选民无法按计划投票，迫使官员在受影响地区将投票时间延长一天。选举观察员表示，这些问题属于后勤性质，欧盟代表团表示，尽管受到一些候选人（即洛佩斯·阿里亚加）的批评，但没有足够的证据支持舞弊指控。 @wfwitness
